name: India Flood Inventory
description: Multi-source geospatial inventory of flood events across India (1960s–2020) with flood extent polygons, dates, affected states and districts, and causal factors.
citation: Saharia, M., Jain, A., Baishya, R.R. et al. India flood inventory: creation of a multi-source national geospatial database to facilitate comprehensive flood research. Nat Hazards 108, 619–633 (2021). https://doi.org/10.1007/s11069-021-04698-6
